name: PhonePe HDFC Bank Uno Credit Card
exclusions: categories excluded under HDFC Bank internal policies
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on spending Rs 1,00,000 in the previous year
additionalBenefits: PhonePe gift card worth Rs 249 on first RuPay credit-card-on-UPI transaction, for cardholders where joining fee is applicable
Additional scratch cards worth Rs 25 each on next 10 RuPay credit-card-on-UPI transactions
2% reward points on select PhonePe categories: recharges, utilities, bill payments and travel
1% reward points on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Ajio, Swiggy, Zomato and Uber
1% reward points on all Scan & Pay spends
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Apply only through the PhonePe app
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
Zero cost card liability when reported immediately

salaried: Gross monthly income greater than Rs 25,000
